title: Buttery Crunchy Malaysian Tortillas Quesadilla
description: Date-night dish featuring crispy tortillas, sweet pickled onions, and spicy chili flakes. Perfect for anti-inflammatory diets and served on a salt block.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the skillet for 30 seconds on each side.
Flip the tortilla and top with a tablespoon of butter.
Place pickle slices, chili flakes, and minced garlic on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and golden brown.
Repeat with remaining tortillas and filling.
Serve immediately on a preheated salt block.
Garnish with additional pickle slices and chili flakes, if desired.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
